name: S-1-propenyl-L-cysteine
summary: Garlic-derived sulfur-containing metabolite tracked for preclinical adipose eNAMPT and hypothalamic-muscle aging signals plus early human circulating-eNAMPT biomarker context.
mechanism_summary: Reported to activate LKB1/SIRT1 signaling in white adipose tissue and increase extracellular NAMPT secretion, connecting adipose signaling to hypothalamic control of aged skeletal-muscle function.

open_questions: Whether S1PC-driven circulating eNAMPT changes replicate in controlled human studies
Whether eNAMPT biomarker movement translates into functional muscle, frailty, or durability outcomes in older adults
Whether aged garlic extract, purified S1PC, and eNAMPT-targeted delivery should be treated as distinct intervention classes
